A_preflight.result: Node v22.19.0, npm 10.9.3, Next.js 14.2.35; dependencies ready

B_endpoint_assetlinks.result: Asset links endpoint reachable; currently returns [] (env vars not set)

C_twa_bubblewrap_init.reason: Interactive prompt (JDK/SDK installation) cannot be automated without pre-configured environment
C_twa_bubblewrap_init.mitigation: Created minimal twa-manifest.json for reference; user must complete Bubblewrap init on local machine with UI
C_twa_bubblewrap_init.next_step:
1) User runs: bubblewrap init --manifest=https://www.vedichour.com/manifest.webmanifest
2) Follow prompts for JDK/SDK installation
3) User runs: bubblewrap build
4) Generate app-release-bundle.aab
5) Return AAB path for Play upload

D_play_upload.reason: Awaiting AAB from Bubblewrap; also requires Play Console service account JSON
D_play_upload.mitigation: Ready to upload once AAB exists and service account is configured
D_play_upload.next_step:
1) Ensure service account JSON exists at secure location
2) Set env: export PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON_PATH=/path/to/play-key.json
3) Once AAB ready: fastlane supply --aab <AAB_PATH> --package_name com.vedichour.app --track internal --json_key $PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON_PATH --skip_upload_images true --skip_upload_screenshots true --skip_upload_metadata true

E_assetlinks_finalization.reason: Awaiting Play App Signing SHA-256 fingerprint from Play Console
E_assetlinks_finalization.mitigation: Once app is uploaded to Play internal testing, obtain fingerprint from Play Console > App integrity > App signing
E_assetlinks_finalization.next_step:
1) After Play upload completes, navigate to Play Console
2) App integrity section > App signing
3) Copy SHA-256 certificate fingerprint
4) Set Vercel env: ANDROID_TWA_SHA256_FINGERPRINTS=<SHA256_COLON_HEX>
5) Re-deploy: vercel --prod --yes
6) Verify assetlinks endpoint returns non-empty JSON

blockers.description: Bubblewrap init is interactive (JDK/SDK installation prompts). Automated non-UI execution not supported.
blockers.action: User must complete JDK/SDK setup on local machine
blockers.command:
bubblewrap init --manifest=https://www.vedichour.com/manifest.webmanifest
Follow prompts; accept JDK and SDK downloads
Confirm twa-manifest.json is created

blockers.description: Android App Bundle (.aab) cannot be built until Bubblewrap init completes.
Google Cloud service account JSON not found. Required for Play upload automation.
blockers.action: Create service account in Google Cloud Console with Play API access; download JSON key

blockers.description: Play Console app listing not verified. Package name and store listing required for upload.
blockers.action: Create app in Play Console; ensure com.vedichour.app is registered
play_steps: Complete store listing (description, privacy policy, screenshots placeholder, etc.)
blockers.command: Verify package name matches; record Play Console app ID

blockers.description: Play App Signing SHA-256 fingerprint not yet obtained. Needed for Digital Asset Links verification.
blockers.action: After Play upload, obtain fingerprint from Play Console App integrity section
blockers.command:
Play Console > [App] > App integrity > App signing > Copy SHA-256 certificate fingerprint
Then: vercel env add ANDROID_TWA_SHA256_FINGERPRINTS
Vercel redeploy: vercel --prod --yes

go_live_decision: NO — blockers C.1, D.1, D.2, D.3, E.1 must be resolved first
go_live_summary: Web deployment and PWA setup complete. Android TWA requires user interaction for Bubblewrap JDK/SDK setup, Play Console configuration, and Play API service account. Follow blocker resolution steps in order.
